summary: Tested release notes automation system (iteration 26). Backend: 8/9 tests passed (release notes CRUD, Creator-only access, auto-version). Frontend: Creator Board UI with Messaggi/Note Rilascio tabs working, release notes form functional. Film creation wizard visible with step indicators 1-12.

issues: Console shows 'Failed to load resource: status 400' - appears to be avatar/resource loading, non-blocking

critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/release-notes endpoint working correctly with Creator-only access (NeoMorpheus)
GET /api/release-notes returns all notes sorted by version desc
CreatorBoard UI has both 'Messaggi' and 'Note Rilascio' tabs
Release notes form has: title input (data-testid), type dropdown (3 options), Pubblica button (data-testid), Aggiungi riga button

success_rate.backend: 88.9% (8/9 tests passed - 1 skipped due to incomplete film payload, not a bug)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (all required UI elements found and working)

seed_data_creation: Created 2 test release notes during testing, cleaned up from MongoDB
context_for_next_testing_agent: Release notes automation fully tested. Creator Board accessible from user menu dropdown. NeoMorpheus (neo@test.com) is the only user who can create release notes. Version auto-increments correctly.
